purpose: Canonical generated bitmap art source for LW-008 before runtime art-pipeline wiring.

sourceImages.postProcess: Local chroma-key removal from flat #ff00ff background with light magenta despill.

prompt: Create one original 4 columns x 2 rows sprite atlas contact sheet for a fantasy cultivation arena game. Each cell contains exactly one centered sprite with generous padding, clean silhouette, no overlap, and no text. Cells, left to right, top row then bottom row: 1 young heroic boy martial cultivator with blue-gold aura; 2 wild horned rhino beast enemy; 3 green scaled eagle enemy with wings spread; 4 stone golem enemy; 5 small qiongqi cub boss beast with horns and fangs; 6 glowing golden fist projectile; 7 red blood essence pickup crystal; 8 turquoise-gold magic VFX burst/setpiece rune. Style: high-detail crisp pixel art, readable at 64x64. Background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key. Constraints: no copyrighted logos, no text, no watermark, no UI frame, no labels.
localPostProcessing: Copied generated source into the workspace.
Removed flat #ff00ff chroma-key background into an RGBA source sheet.
Sliced the generated source as a 4x2 contact sheet.
Trimmed transparent padding per cell, downsampled each sprite into a 64x64 runtime frame, and composed assets/imagegen/atlas.png.
